notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Paul Goldschmidt to 3rd. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Paul Goldschmidt to 3rd. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Trent Grisham pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Trent Grisham singles on a ground ball to left fielder Isaac Collins.
